title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at PolicyBazaar

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at PolicyBazaar
jsonLd.description:
Join the PolicyBazaar family as a Software Engineer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PolicyBazaar:
PolicyBazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar!
